accountFactory.note: AccountFactory.deploy(public_key, credential_id) -> deploys a webauthn-account, emits ('deployed', credential_id) -> address for eventsIndexer. This is factoryContractId for eventsIndexer({ rpcUrl, factoryContractId }).

factoryDeployProof.note: Test invocation proving the factory deploys + emits the indexer event.

provenCheckAuth.note: Pre-existing single account proving the secp256r1 __check_auth path (success + a wrong-key rejection), from scripts/onchain-e2e.ts.

createFromScratchProof.note: Full create-from-scratch via factoryDeployer: fresh passkey -> factory.deploy -> sign protected() -> __check_auth SUCCESS; wrong key -> FAILED. Reproduce: SOURCE_SECRET=... pnpm --filter @soropass/core exec tsx scripts/factory-e2e.ts

transferProof.note: REAL passkey-authorized XLM transfer (25 XLM) from a factory-deployed smart account to a fresh account, via the native SAC. Correct key SUCCESS, wrong key FAILED. Reproduce: scripts/transfer-e2e.ts
